fields.name: question
fields.label: Question
fields.placeholder: e.g. "In one sentence, what is a Petri net?"

data.label: Internal Pool Agent
data.description: A single-shot (degenerate, no-tools, maxTurns 1) Agent bound to a self-hosted model served through the in-cluster inference router. The editor surfaces `provider` as `internal` (a loaded-set Model picker with locked base_url/api_key overrides — GDPR: an internal binding cannot silently escape off-router); the compiler remaps it and emits the `openai` (OpenAI-compatible router path) WIRE shape. `model` is the loaded model id curated in the `internal_pool_registry`, and `resourceAlias` binds the `internal_pool_router` (`internal_llm`) resource whose `base_url` overlays the router endpoint at fire time — so the inference HTTP call goes base_url→router and is NEVER net-admitted.
data.systemPrompt: You are a concise assistant. Answer in a single sentence.
